basic_details.job_title: NALCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Community Mobilizer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Community Mobiliser, Office Assistant and Office Attendant

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Community Mobilizer: Graduate in any discipline Office Assistant: Graduate in any discipline. Additionally Diploma in IT / Office Management will be preferred Office Attendant: 10th Pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NALCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nalcoindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NALCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for NALCO Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in NALCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NALCO is recruiting for three posts: Community Mobiliser, Office Assistant, and Office Attendant. Each post has one vacancy.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Community Mobiliser and Office Assistant, a Graduate degree in any discipline is required. For Office Attendant, a 10th pass is the minimum qualification. A diploma in IT or Office Management is preferred for the Office Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NALCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 45 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,000/- per month for Office Attendant to Rs. 28,500/- per month for Community Mobiliser and Office Assistant.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NALCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the NALCO posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NALCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NALCO, www.nalcoindia.com. Direct links are usually provided in the recruitment section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration specified in the appointment letter.
